DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCARTAN, DANIELE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCARTAN, DANIELE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONTI, NICHOLAS $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,875.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L) IN BAD FAITH. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $275.00, AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
